# Project Guidelines

## General Approach

It is important to note that when working on this project, you should please make sure to keep in mind that the code quality is very important. As a general rule, it should be noted that you need to follow best practices at all times. In order to maintain the highest standards, please make sure to always be careful when writing code. It is important to note that needless to say the quality of the codebase depends on every developer following these guidelines consistently. For the purpose of maintaining a clean and readable codebase, in terms of code quality, you should always strive to write the best code possible.

## Testing Guidelines

It is important to note that testing is a very important part of the development process. Please make sure to write tests for all your code. Keep in mind that tests should be comprehensive and cover all edge cases. It should be noted that in order to ensure quality, you need to follow the testing best practices. As a general rule, tests should be written before the implementation code. For the purpose of maintaining test quality, please make sure to review your tests carefully.
